required_preferences.fact: Strictly avoids melatonin or other sleep aids—even during high-stress periods—due to physician’s orders regarding insomnia treatment

supersedes.fact: Takes melatonin only during exam periods—avoids sleep medication otherwise

required_preferences.fact: Has begun organizing speaker events on shorter notice and with greater flexibility—prefers adaptable planning over strict advance scheduling due to unstable summer commitments

supersedes.fact: Organizes monthly speaker events at least four weeks in advance—never leaves event planning to last minute

required_preferences.fact: Joins building group dinners only if they’re under six people—avoids large gatherings with unfamiliar neighbors
Only schedules patent research tasks in the morning when focus is highest—never attempts detailed legal work late at night
Regularly brings home-cooked plant-based snacks and easy meals to her grandmother during visits, ensuring dietary needs and comfort are met
Reviews ingredient labels for iron content and prioritizes new grocery purchases based on doctor-recommended fortified or iron-rich foods

persona: A law student specializing in intellectual property law
